titleStmt.title: SII 25.20: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 20. (A.R. No. 20 of 1908.) DĀRĀŚURAM, KUMBAKONAM TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: East wall of the first prākāra of the Airāvatēśvara temple.
This inscription commences with the praśasti, Puyalvāyttu, etc., of the Chōḷa king Kulōttuṅga III. The order is dated in the 64th day of the 8th year of the king.

It records an order of the king issued to his officials Kaḷappāḷarāyaṉ and Villavadarayaṉ on the application of Maṇalūr Vāduli Ārāmudu Śrī. •• alias Madhurāntaka-brahmārāyaṉ of Rājarājach-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Nittavinōda-vaḷanāḍu who in turn ordered the authorities of the temple of Rājarāja-Īśvaram-uḍaiyār including those in-charge of the temple treasury called Rājarājaṉ-karuvūgalam (-vūlagam) appointing the jewel-makers in the above temple and fixing the remuneration to be paid to such people on a par with the garland-makers (tiruppaḷḷittoṅgal-uḍaiyār) along with a site (maṉai) as jīvita so that the former could reach home early.

The order was drafted by Neṟiyuḍaich-chōḻa-mūvēndavēḷāṉ and attested by Nandiyaraiyar, Nuḷambādirāyar, Pāṇḍyarāyar, Vēsāliyarayar, Virāṭarāyar, Vayirādarāyar, Viśaiyarāyar, Kanakarāyar and Aṉakarāyar.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . puyal vāyttu vaḷamperukap poyyāta ṉāṉmaṟaiyiṉ ceyal va kaḷum jayamakaḷuñ ciṟantu vāḻa veṇmatipoṟ koṭai viḷaṅka vel ventar Aṭivaṇaṅka maṇmaṭaintai maṉaṅkaḷippa maṉuniti taḻaittoṅkac cakkaramuñ ceṅkolun tikkaṉaittuñ celanaṭappak kaṟpakālam puvikāppap poṟppamainta
muṭi puṉaintu cempoṉ virasiṅhāsaṉattup puvaṉa muḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaru kecaripaṟmarāṉa tiripuvaṉac cakkaravarttikaḷ śrīkulōttuṅka coḻatevaṟkku yāṇṭu Eṭṭāvatu nāḷ Aṟupattu nāliṉāl pirasātañ ceytaruḷiṉa ceyyum paṭippaṭi kaḷappāḷarāyaṉum villavatarayaṉum Uṭaiyār rāja rāja Īśvaramuṭaiyār
ke śvara kaṇkāṇi tirucciṟṟampala muṭaiyāṉum śrīkāriyam poṉ meynta coḻa vāyaṉum tirumāḷikaikaṭaṟu ceyvārkaḷum tirumāḷikai rāja rājaṉ karuvukalattārum ceyyat tiruvāymoḻintaruḷiṉapaṭi Uṭaiyār rāja rāja Īśvaramuṭaiyār koyilukkup poṟpaṇi Eṭuppārkaḷu tāyamāka Oruvar mutal koḷḷavum Ipperkku nittaviṉotava
ḷanā kaṭaṟṟattu kakkāṭāṉa rāja rājaccarup petimaṅkalattu maṇalūr vātuli Ārā Amutu śrī va ṉāṉa maturāntakap pirammarāyaṉ sāmutāyamāy niṟkavum Ivaṉukkuk koṟṟukku nāḷ Oṉṟukku Ūṟkālāl tūṇippatakku nellum Āṭṭaikku vai mutal kācu Ikkoyiṟ tiruppaḷḷit toṅkaluṭaiyārkaḷukku sāmutāyamāy niṟkiṟavaṉ peṟṟapaṭiye peṟa
vum nellup peṟum Iṭattu vāciyum Iḷanāḷum nikkāte Ittevar tevatāṉam vikkirama coḻavaḷa nāṭṭuk kavaittalaiyāṉa paṇṭitacoḻac caruppetimaṅkalattu Ivaṉ kāṇiyāṉa nilam Uṭpaṭaveṇṭum nilam jivitam Aṭaikkavum Ivaṉ kāṉāmeyk kāṭṭip peṟavum Ivaṉukkup poṟpaṇi Eṭuppār maṉaiuṭaṉe cera Oru maṉai Iṭavum peṟaveṇumeṉṟu Ivaṉ namakku
c coṉṉamaiyil Ippaṭi ceyyak kaṭavatāka collik kaṇakkilum Iṭṭuk koḷḷak kaṭavarkaḷāka varik kūṟu cey kkuc coṉṉom Ivaṉ nāḷ Aṟupatu mutal poṟpaṇi Eṭuppārkkup kā mu tāyamāp kkā ṭṭup peṟṟuppuṭavai mutalukkup peṟukiṟa kācu tirumāḷikai rāja rājaṉ karuvukalatte peṟavum nellu vāciyum Iḷanāḷum nikkāte pa
ṇṭita coḻac caruppetimaṅkalattu Ivaṉ kāṇiyāṉa nilam Uṭpaṭa veṇṭum nilam [jivi]tamāka Aṭaikkavum Ivaṉukkup poṟpaṇi Eṭuppār maṉai Uṭaṉecera Orumaṉai Iṭavum vaḻakkaṅkaḷil paricaṭṭan tarattile peṟakkaṭavaṉāākavum paṇṇi Ippaṇi Ivaṉukkum Ivaṉ vaṟkattārkkum kāṇiyāka Ikkoyiṟ tirumāḷikaiyile kalveṭṭakkaṭavatākavum paṇṇuvateṉ
ṟu tirumantira Ōlai neṟiyuṭaic coḻuventaveḷān Eḻuti- nantiyaraiyarum nuḷampāti rāyarum pāṇṭiyarāyarum rāyarum vecāliyāyarum virāṭarāyarum vayirākarāyarum vicaiyarāyarum kaṉakarāyarum rum Aṉakarāyarum Eḻuttiṭṭup pirasātañceytaruḷi vantatu .
Digital edition of SII 25.20 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
